description: Introduce: trait Reconcile { fn reconcile(current: Option<&Self>, incoming: Self, revision: u64) -> (Self, u64); }. Reimplement replace_if_changed + the inherent same_state/free-fn reconcilers in terms of it, KEEPING current monotonic behavior (reconcile returns (incoming, if same {rev} else {rev+1})). Slots still hold revision for now. Green, behavior-identical, proves the interface. Foundation for the rest.
title: Reconcile trait + route reconcile machinery through it (behavior-preserving)
